searchable_fields.description: FTS5-indexed columns. Change takes effect after rebuilding the FTS index via the Rebuild FTS button.

saved_search_scopes.description: Which saved-search scopes are available to users.

default_operators.description: FTS5 operators suggested in the search input autocomplete.

snippet_length.description: Number of tokens shown in the FTS5 highlight snippet (minimum 8, maximum 200).

max_results_per_page.description: Maximum page_size the search endpoint will honour.

facet_fields.description: Facet dimensions shown in the search sidebar.

cmdk_enabled.description: When false the Cmd-K command palette is hidden for all users of this tenant.

cmdk_recents_count.description: How many recent searches to store per user in localStorage for the palette.
